creator: amendlik@gmail.com
text:
When running `freebsd-update` using the SSM Agent, the process fails with the following output. I have seen this both when attempting to use the `firstboot_freebsd_update` service, and when running `freebsd-update` directly.

Here is the command I'm using: su -l root -c 'service firstboot_freebsd_update onestart'

And the output:
freebsd-update 6284 - - src component not installed, skipped
freebsd-update 6284 - - Looking up aws.update.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 1 mirrors found.
freebsd-update 6284 - - Fetching metadata signature for 14.1-RELEASE from dualstack.aws.update.freebsd.org... done.
freebsd-update 6284 - - Fetching metadata index... done.
freebsd-update 6284 - - Inspecting system... done.
rm: tmpfile: No such file or directory
rm: tmpfile: No such file or directory
sha256: tmpfile: No such file or directory
[: !=: unexpected operator
/usr/sbin/freebsd-update: cannot open tmpfile: No such file or directory
rm: tmpfile: No such file or directory
rm: tmpfile: No such file or directory
rm: tmpfile: No such file or directory
rm: tmpfile: No such
---Error truncated----
